hero.subtitle: Premium language training, preparation for international certifications and end-to-end guidance toward international mobility — notably to Germany and many other destinations — 6 active campuses in Benin, open to the world.

footer.tagline: Multi-campus language institute network, founded in 2021 in Benin. Academic excellence and full support toward international mobility.

home.about_title: An institutional network built for linguistic success.
home.about_p1: Founded in 2021, MULTIPLIKATOR has rapidly grown into one of Benin's leading language institute networks. Six active campuses, a structured pedagogical programme and a team of specialised trainers guide our candidates toward international certifications and mobility.
home.about_p2: Our approach blends academic rigour, personalised mentoring and flexibility — every learning path is built to deliver a concrete outcome: entering a university, securing a visa, passing an official exam or building an international career.
home.strengths_title: Academic excellence at the service of your mobility.

strengths.d: One-on-one pedagogical follow-up throughout your journey. Small groups, undivided attention.
GODOMEY PK 14, AKPAKPA, PORTO-NOVO, LOKOSSA, DJOUGOU, PARAKOU — genuine geographic proximity.
Goethe, ÖSD, TestDaF, IELTS, TOEFL, DELF/DALF.
The same quality wherever you are — diaspora included.
Studies, FSJ/BFD, Au Pair, family reunification, tourist visa.
Full levels, accessible sublevels, generous bundles.

home.departments_title: Six centres of expertise for every project.
home.online_title: Follow MULTIPLIKATOR from anywhere in the world.
home.online_desc: The same level of guidance as on-site, flexible time slots adapted to your time zone, designed for the diaspora and for cities without an MPK campus.
home.final_kicker: Sign up at the campus of your choice or online. Our team will help you design the path that fits.

investment.hero_title: Invest in the next chapter of MULTIPLIKATOR.
investment.hero_kicker: Do you believe in premium language education in West Africa? Join us as an investor, institutional partner or patron to accelerate our regional expansion.
investment.projects_intro: We are currently finalising the detailed plans of several structuring projects. Investment terms, amounts and partnership formats will be discussed case by case with each potential partner.

projects.d: Opening of additional campuses to bring premium language training closer to the youth across the country.
Construction of a premium residential campus with on-site housing, dining and intensive immersion programme — a unique offer in West Africa.
Development of a proprietary learning platform with HD video content, interactive exercises and remote support for the diaspora.
A dedicated training centre for multilingual tour guides, in partnership with Beninese tourism authorities.

advantages.d: Strong continuous expansion since 2022, Goethe pass rate above 90%, stable multi-campus footprint.
Mobility from Benin to Germany is growing fast: rising demand for trainers, translators and visa consultants.
Training, translations, visa consulting, online shop, tourism, space rental — mature and resilient diversification.
Experienced executive and academic leadership, in-place digital tech team, broad alumni network across Germany.

investment.partnerships_intro: Exact terms (duration, return, governance) are defined jointly in a private conversation with the Executive Direction.

partnerships.d: Equity stake with governance oversight and strategic involvement.
Repayable financing, convertible into shares depending on performance and agreed milestones.
Philanthropic support, cohort sponsorship or campus naming with dedicated visibility.

investment.cta_title: Contact us to discuss the terms.
investment.cta_kicker: If you wish to invest in MULTIPLIKATOR, get in touch to schedule a confidential conversation. We will walk you through the projects in detail, their budgets and the partnership formats best suited to your profile.

campuses.hero_title: 6 physical campuses in Benin — and online.
campuses.hero_kicker: GODOMEY PK 14, AKPAKPA, PORTO-NOVO, LOKOSSA, DJOUGOU, PARAKOU — plus online courses for every other city.
campuses.online_desc: Online courses for every city in Benin and the diaspora.

training_plus.hero_kicker: German, English, French as a Foreign Language, Chinese. From accessible semi-intensive to Premium VIP fast-track — structured by sublevels so you can start at your own pace.
training_plus.section_german_kicker: Buy your German course here, based on your level. Every sublevel (A1.1, A1.2 … up to C2.2) is a standalone product. Start where you wish after assessment, or stack full levels to unlock the bundles below.
training_plus.courses_title: Buy your level, sublevel by sublevel
training_plus.courses_intro: Each sublevel (A1.1, A1.2, A2.1, A2.2, etc.) is a standalone product. Start wherever you want after assessment, or chain full levels to benefit from our advantageous bundles.
training_plus.courses_note: NB · One-time registration fee: 5,000 FCFA · Documentation fee per level: 10,000 FCFA · 15% discount on full upfront payment.
training_plus.exam_title: Goethe-Zertifikat & ÖSD — see MPK Exam Prep.
training_plus.exam_desc: Preparation courses (Goethe A1 → B2 and ÖSD A1 → B2) are handled by our dedicated department MPK Exam Prep, with internal/external learner pricing and 3-week duration per level.
training_plus.full_intro: If you plan to take both sublevels in a row, the full level is more cost-effective.
training_plus.bundles_title: Multi-level packs — save while planning ahead.
training_plus.bundles_intro: 10% off on 2-level packs and 15% off on 3-level packs, paid in full upfront.
training_plus.vip_eyebrow: German Premium VIP Fast-Track A1 → B1
training_plus.vip_title: 4 weeks per level · 56 teaching units per sublevel
training_plus.vip_intro: Monday to Thursday, 08:00 – 14:30 (two 20-minute breaks). Class starts with as few as 2 candidates. One-time registration fee: 10,000 FCFA. 15% discount on full upfront payment.
training_plus.vip_int_eyebrow: Premium VIP Intensive Fast-Track B2 → C1
training_plus.vip_int_intro: Monday to Thursday 08:00 – 14:30. Registration fee: 10,000 FCFA. Payment available in 2 instalments.
training_plus.coming_desc: Offer being updated — details available shortly. Contact us to be notified as soon as registrations open.
training_plus.cta_title: An MPK advisor will guide you to the right path.

exam_prep.hero_kicker: Targeted support to ace globally recognised official language exams — from Goethe to TOEFL, via TestDaF and DELF.
exam_prep.courses_intro: Short intensive courses (3 weeks per level) to secure the Goethe-Zertifikat or the ÖSD. Internal rates (MPK learners) and External rates (independent candidates).
exam_prep.note: NB · Each preparation level lasts 3 weeks.
exam_prep.modules_intro: For those who want to strengthen one specific skill (speaking, writing, reading, listening) without following a full path. Pricing case by case depending on target level and desired duration.
exam_prep.approach_title: Three pillars to earn your certification.
exam_prep.approach_1_d: Exam-condition simulations, corrected and analysed item by item.
exam_prep.approach_2_d: Precise identification of areas to strengthen in each section (comprehension, expression, grammar).
exam_prep.approach_3_d: Trainers fully aligned with each body's specific requirements and regularly updated.

history.hero_title: From Benin to the world — the MULTIPLIKATOR journey.
history.hero_kicker: Five years of language commitment, six active campuses, hundreds of success stories — the story of a Beninese network that bet on excellence.
history.origin_p1: "Multiplikator" is the German word for "multiplier" — the one who passes on, amplifies, multiplies. The name embodies our deepest conviction: every learner we train becomes, in turn, a transmitter — a bridge between Benin and the German, French and English-speaking worlds.
history.origin_p2: Founded in 2021 in Benin, MULTIPLIKATOR was born from a simple belief: ambitious Beninese youth deserve access to rigorous, structured and certifying language education in foreign languages — without leaving their country to reach the level of excellence that makes them fully eligible for international opportunities.
history.timeline_title: Five years, six campuses, a thousand stories.

timeline.d: MULTIPLIKATOR Institute of Languages is founded in Godomey, in Cotonou's northern outskirts. One vision: deliver accessible premium language education, rooted in Benin yet open to the world.
First successes at the official certifications of the Goethe-Institut Lomé. The first cohorts secure their A1, A2 and B1 diplomas. The second campus opens in Akpakpa to meet the growing demand.
Opening of the Porto-Novo and Lokossa campuses. MULTIPLIKATOR now covers Southern Benin and launches its MPK Translation Pro department to meet the administrative needs of mobility candidates.

timeline.t: The network takes shape — heading north
timeline.d: Djougou and Parakou campuses are born to serve the north of the country. Launch of the Premium VIP Fast-Track programme and restructuring of the institute's service hubs.

Launch of the Tour Guides Training Academy and of the Tourism department through pilot phases focused on recreational and touristic outings in Ganvié and Grand Popo. Building on this field experience, the department grows steadily and methodically.
Opening of 100% online courses for the diaspora, launch of the online shop and of the digital registration platform. Vision: become THE language reference for West Africa.

values.d: Structured pedagogy, specialised trainers and individual follow-up to lead every learner to success.
Every learner becomes an ambassador — a multiplier of cultures, opportunities and achievements.
From Benin to Germany, Austria and the international francophone world — we build bridges.
Our courses follow CEFR standards and prepare for officially recognised international certifications.

history.cta_title: Be part of what comes next.
history.cta_kicker: The MULTIPLIKATOR story keeps being written — and your level could be the next chapter.

alumni.hero_kicker: Studies, Ausbildung, Au Pair, family reunification, full-time contract — discover the journey of our former learners now established in Germany and Austria.
alumni.share_invite: Are you a former learner who moved to Europe?
alumni.share_suffix: — we will add it to this page.

extra_services.hero_kicker: Everything that complements a training or an international project — handled by our expert teams.

services.d: Professional writing and layout of your Curriculum Vitae (FR / DE / EN). Adapted to European, American or African standards depending on your project.
Bespoke cover letter, tailored to the country, the field and the target role. Collaborative work on storytelling and argument.
One-off sessions to prepare an interview, a presentation, an important phone call or an exchange with a foreign administration.
Small administrative tasks, express translation, appointment booking, phone support, online procedures — whatever you need day to day.
End-to-end support for university admission procedures: school selection, application files, platforms (Uni-Assist, Campus France, etc.), follow-up.
Anything tied to a move or international mobility — visa, housing, bank account, insurance, first steps in your destination country.
On request — express training, entrepreneurial support, professional advice. Reach out for any specific need.

about.hero_title: An institution built for international mobility.
about.hero_kicker: Since 2021, MULTIPLIKATOR has been building a structured pedagogical network, centred on the quality of its programmes and the end-to-end support of each candidate.
about.history_title: From 2021 to today — a network on the rise.
about.history_p1: MULTIPLIKATOR was born from one conviction: mastering a foreign language unlocks decisive academic, professional and human horizons. To carry this ambition at scale, we chose a multi-campus model, deployed step by step across Benin.
about.history_p2: Four years on, six active campuses and over 850 trained candidates make up our community.

mvv.mission_d: Train confident speakers, able to succeed in their study, work or relocation project abroad.
mvv.vision_d: Become the reference language institute network in West Africa, blending academic rigour and accessibility.
mvv.values_d: Rigour, human support, transparent pricing, respect for individual goals.

about.approach_title: A progression structured by levels and sublevels, anchored in continuous assessment.
about.approach_p: Splitting into sublevels (A1.1, A1.2, …) provides an accessible entry point while keeping the coherence of a full path. Small groups, dedicated trainers, regular assessment: the pedagogy is calibrated to lead you to certification.

team.hero_kicker: Current leadership, technical team and former colleagues now based in Germany — all committed to the MULTIPLIKATOR journey.

translation_pro.hero_kicker: German · French · English — other languages on request. Confidentiality, terminological precision and on-time delivery.

services.d: Administrative, academic and legal documents. Compliant with the requirements of public authorities.
For embassies and official files. Stamp and signature of the sworn translator.
Letters, emails, contracts — translated in the right tone and register.
Consecutive or liaison for meetings, negotiations and events.

translation_pro.quote_title: Send your documents in full confidence.

al-06.quote: The sublevel structure let me progress without pressure.

al-08.quote: A serious school that delivers on its pedagogical promises.

clubs_page.hero_kicker: Beyond the classroom, MULTIPLIKATOR cultivates a real community life: sport, cultural exchange and immersive language practice. Five clubs open to every learner and alumni.
clubs_page.sport_kicker: Regular sport is part of the MULTIPLIKATOR experience. Discipline, team spirit and cohesion — our three clubs welcome all levels.
clubs_page.lang_kicker: A language is lived as much as it is learned. Our immersive conversation clubs let you practise in a relaxed setting, in or outside of class.
clubs_page.cta_title: Sport, culture and living languages — it all starts here.
clubs_page.mfc_desc: The official MULTIPLIKATOR football club. Weekly training, inter-campus tournaments and friendly matches with other institutions across Benin.
clubs_page.mbc_desc: Regular basketball practice for learners and alumni. Team spirit, self-challenge and participation in local championships.
clubs_page.mvc_desc: Mixed volleyball and competition, open to every level. Festive outings, tournaments and a celebration of MPK community spirit.
clubs_page.mec_desc: Immersive English conversation — themed discussions, debates, cultural workshops and original-version movie nights. Led by natives and certified trainers.
clubs_page.mdk_desc: The German club: Stammtisch, creative writing workshops, cultural exchange with Benin's German-speaking community and our alumni in Germany.
